sidebar.demoAviso: Demo shell — session, language and dark mode are a functional simulation (see README-DEMO.md).
login.errorBloqueado: Too many failed attempts. PIN sign-in is temporarily locked; try again in a few minutes.
login.errorGenerico: Could not sign in. Try again.
login.demoAviso: DEMO login by email + PIN only — no JWT / server cookies. Production uses the TOTP + facial verification flow described in the security ADRs (stage 2 of this project).
login.credencialesDemo: Demo accounts: ana.rodriguez@chickenkitchen.demo (cashier, PIN 1234) · carlos.gomez@chickenkitchen.demo (manager, PIN 9999)
login.email.errorGenerico: Could not verify that email. Try again.
login.pendiente.mensaje: Your account for {{email}} is pending manager approval. Please try again later.
login.registro.subtitulo: We didn't find an account for {{email}}. Complete your info to request access.
login.registro.ssnAyuda: For your security we only ask for the last 4 digits — never enter your full SSN.
login.registro.errorGenerico: Could not submit your registration. Try again.
login.registroExitoso.mensaje: A manager must assign you a PIN before you can sign in.
jornada.pantalla.instruccion: Employees: type this code into the app on your phone to confirm you're on site. The code changes every 10 seconds.
jornada.pantalla.errorCodigo: Could not fetch the code. Retrying...
jornada.pantalla.instruccionQr: Employees: scan this QR code with your phone's camera to open the clock-in page with the code pre-filled. It changes every 10 seconds, same as the numeric code.
jornada.pantalla.demoAviso: DEMO — real TOTP code (RFC 6238), but this screen does not replace physical access controls at the store.
jornada.marcar.subtitulo: Clock in or out. You'll need the code shown on the store's central screen.
jornada.marcar.facialInstruccion: Simulated camera — in production this would show the live camera preview for real facial recognition.
jornada.marcar.usarBiometriaReal: Use Face ID / Touch ID on this device
jornada.marcar.biometriaNoSoportada: Your device doesn't support biometric verification; use the options below.
jornada.marcar.simularAviso: Or simulate the result (no real biometrics):
jornada.marcar.bloqueadoDetalle: You used up all 3 attempts. Try again in {{tiempo}}, or use your backup PIN.
jornada.marcar.codigoInstruccion: Read the 6-digit code on the store's central screen (/jornada/pantalla) and type it here.
jornada.marcar.pinRespaldoInstruccion: Enter your access PIN to record the clock-in without facial verification.
jornada.marcar.metodoFacial: Verified by facial recognition (simulated) + central screen code.
jornada.marcar.demoAviso: DEMO — on devices with Face ID/Touch ID/Windows Hello, facial verification uses REAL OS-level biometrics (WebAuthn); the server doesn't verify the cryptographic signature (see README-DEMO.md). The simulate buttons remain as a fallback. The TOTP code and attempt lockout are real logic.
jornada.codigoGerencial.subtitulo: Daily code to authorize manager-level actions (e.g. voids or discounts) when entering a PIN in person isn't practical. Changes once a day.
jornada.codigoGerencial.errorCodigo: Could not fetch the code. Try again.
jornada.codigoGerencial.verificarInstruc: If you received a code from a manager by phone or chat, confirm here whether it's valid for today.
jornada.codigoGerencial.noAutorizadoMens: Only a store manager or developer account can view the manager authorization code.
jornada.codigoGerencial.demoAviso: DEMO — real TOTP code (RFC 6238) with a 1-day period, reusing the same algorithm as the clock-in check. This mechanism is NOT yet wired into the POS discount/void flows (see README-DEMO.md); this screen demonstrates generating and validating the code end to end.
chatbot.demoAviso: DEMO: keyword-based answers (not a real LLM). See README-DEMO.md.
chatbot.bienvenida: Hi, I'm the POS help assistant. Ask me about refunds, marking a product sold out (86), opening/closing a cash register shift, clocking in/out, adding a new employee, generating payroll, or changing the language/dark mode. You can type or use the microphone.
chatbot.sttNoSoportado: Your browser doesn't support voice input. Try Chrome or Edge, or type your question.
chatbot.ttsNoSoportado: Your browser doesn't support reading answers aloud.
chatbot.errorVoz: Couldn't recognize the audio. Try again or type your question.
chatbot.sugerenciaReembolso: How do I process a refund?
chatbot.sugerenciaAgotado: How do I mark an item sold out?
chatbot.manosLibresActivo: Hands-free mode is on: it will keep listening automatically after each response.
api.sinConexion: No connection to the server. Check your network and try again.
api.encoladoSinConexion: No connection: the action was queued and will sync automatically once you're back online.
home.descripcion: End-to-end functional demo (counter → kitchen → payment → inventory). In-memory state, simulated PSP and hardware. Not the approved production architecture.
home.tileEmpleadosDesc: Onboarding, shifts and attendance (demo time clock)
home.footer: Chicken Kitchen · Pilot store: Miami, FL (15738 SW 72nd St)
pos.errorCargaTerminal: Could not load the cashier terminal.
pos.historial.errorCarga: Could not load the order history.
pos.historial.sinPedidos: No delivered or charged orders yet.
pos.nuevo.avisoEnviado: This order has already been sent to the kitchen.
pos.cobrar.errorCarga: Could not load the orders to charge.
pos.cobrar.sinPedidos: No orders delivered by the kitchen are pending charge right now.
pos.cobrar.seleccionaPedido: Select an order from the list to charge it.
pos.errorNoPudoIniciar: Could not start the cashier terminal.
pos.errorNoPudoAgregarProducto: Could not add the product to the ticket.
pos.errorNoPudoActualizarLinea: Could not update the ticket line.
pos.errorNoPudoQuitarLinea: Could not remove the ticket line.
pos.errorNoPudoEnviarCocina: Could not send the order to the kitchen.
pos.categorias.vacio: There are no categories in the catalog.
pos.descuento.avisoBloqueoActivo: This order has a discount applied: lines are locked (no quantity change or removal) until you remove it.
pos.descuento.motivoQuitar: Discount removed to unlock line editing
pos.cobro.sinConexionAviso: No connection detected: the card payment will be queued (offline) so as not to block the cashier.
pos.cobro.pagadaCompleto: This order is already paid in full.
pos.ticket.tocaProducto: Tap a product to add it to the order.
pos.ticket.lineasBloqueadasPorDescuento: Lines locked: a discount is applied. Remove it (Apply discount -> $0) to edit quantities or remove items.
kds.sync: KDS · sync every {{seg}}s (demo; production = WebSocket, ADR-0003)
kds.sinConexionBanner: No connection to the order server. Showing the last known queue (offline mode) — retrying automatically.
kds.cocinaAlDia: The kitchen is all caught up.
kds.notificacionDemoraMensaje: Order #{{numero}} is delayed in the kitchen (18+ min).
reportes.subtitulo: Phase 3 (reportes-analitica-pos) placeholder. Live summary of the Miami, FL pilot store.
reportes.verAnulaciones: View voids and refunds by employee →
reportes.tiempos.subtitulo: Who took each order, when it entered the kitchen, and when it left for the register — to resolve delay disputes and spot time-of-day bottleneck patterns.
reportes.tiempos.errorCarga: Could not load the timing report.
reportes.tiempos.sinPedidos: No orders in that date range.
reportes.tiempos.notaCreadoPor: "Taken by" is only tracked from this update onward and requires the POS client to send the user (pending, see limitation in the task report). Until then, the cashier who opened the register shift is shown as a reference — it isn't always exactly who took that specific order.
reportes.tiempos.horaSubtitulo: Average kitchen time by the hour the order was created, within the selected range.
reportes.tiempos.sinDatosHora: No orders in range to group by hour.
reportes.anulaciones.subtitulo: How many voids (pre-payment) and refunds (post-payment) each employee made in the range, and which products were involved — for counter fraud/abuse detection.
reportes.anulaciones.errorCarga: Could not load the voids report.
reportes.anulaciones.sinEventos: No voids or refunds in the selected range.
empleados.subtitulo: Onboarding, shifts/schedules and attendance (DEMO time clock).
empleados.detalle.soloActivosMarcan: Only active employees can clock in/out. This employee's status is "{{estado}}".
empleados.detalle.horasNota: Regular vs. overtime (>40h/week) is calculated when payroll runs.
empleados.modal.nuevoDescripcion: Created in "onboarding" status. Login (PIN) access is generated once onboarding is completed.
empleados.modal.errorTarifaInvalida: The hourly rate must be a positive number (e.g. 15.00).
empleados.modal.completarDescripcion: Assign an access PIN for {{nombre}}. Confirming will create their login user and move them to "active" status.
empleados.modal.bajaDescripcion: Logical termination of {{nombre}}. The record is not deleted (payroll/audit history); their login access is disabled.
empleados.modal.motivoPlaceholder: Voluntary resignation, end of contract, etc.
empleados.reloj.descripcion: XmartClock-style simulation: no real GPS or facial recognition. Clock manually and use the checkboxes to simulate an alert.
empleados.reloj.errorNoPudoRegistrar: Could not record the time clock entry.
nomina.subtitulo: Reference report of hours worked (regular and overtime) and tips, to feed your external payroll/ERP system. Does not calculate rates or pay wages.
nomina.demoAviso: this module does NOT calculate hourly rate, withholding, or net pay, and has no "pay" button (scope decision S-17: a rate error or manipulation inside the POS could produce incorrect payments without the controls of a dedicated payroll system). It only reports regular/overtime hours (simplified DEMO rule: >40h/week, FLSA-style) and reference tips; the real pay calculation must happen in your external payroll/ERP system.
nomina.errorCarga: Could not load the hours report.
nomina.errorCorrer: Could not generate the hours report.
nomina.sinRecibos: No reports generated yet. Choose a period and generate the hours report.
menu.subtitulo: Add new dishes to the catalog and browse existing products by category.
menu.modal.nuevoDescripcion: It's added to the catalog as available and active immediately.
menu.modal.errorPrecioInvalido: The price must be a positive number (e.g. 9.99).
menu.receta.sinInsumosCatalogo: There are no ingredients in the catalog to add.
menu.receta.sinIngredientes: This product has no ingredients yet. Add the first one below.
menu.receta.errorCarga: Could not load the product's recipe.
menu.receta.errorInsumoRequerido: Select an ingredient for every row.
menu.receta.errorInsumoDuplicado: Don't repeat the same ingredient twice in the recipe.
menu.receta.errorCantidadInvalida: Quantity must be a number greater than 0.
perfiles.modal.descripcion: View and edit each employee's schedule, access PIN, and hourly rate.
perfiles.modal.errorPinInvalido: The PIN must be exactly 4 digits.
empleados.modal.horarioDescripcion: Schedule {{nombre}}'s week. Check the days they work and set their hours.
empleados.modal.errorRangoHoras: End time must be after start time.
empleados.modal.errorSeleccionaDia: Check at least one day the employee works.
empleados.modal.errorGuardadoParcial: {{guardados}} of {{total}} days were saved before it failed. {{detalle}} The days already saved are locked; fix and retry the rest.
empleados.modal.diaYaTieneHorario: Already has a schedule this day.
empleados.modal.overtimeMensaje: This will give {{nombre}} more than 40 hours this week ({{horas}} hours total). Hours after 40 will be paid as overtime. Do you want to authorize it anyway?
login.subtituloIniciarSesion: Enter your email and PIN to sign in.
login.subtituloRegistro: Fill in your information below. A manager will need to assign you a PIN before you can sign in.
login.errorNoRegistrado: We could not find an account for that email. Use "Register" to request access.
login.registro.ssnOmitidoDeveloper: Digenius developer accounts (@digeniusai.com) do not need an SSN.
login.registro.pinDeveloperAyuda: Developer accounts activate immediately with the PIN you choose here — no manager approval needed.
login.registro.errorPin: Enter a PIN between 4 and 6 digits.
miPerfil.descripcion: Edit your own information and update your access PIN.
miPerfil.sinEmpleado: We could not find an employee profile linked to your account.
miPerfil.pinDescripcion: Update the PIN you use to sign in.
miPerfil.errorPinInvalido: The PIN must be exactly 4 digits.
